ddls:
CREATE TABLE "keypad_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction event */,
  "keypad_type" TEXT /* Type of keypad (e.g., 2x2, 4x4) */,
  "button_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the button that was pressed */,
  "interaction_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the interaction occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., click, long press) */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the user who performed the interaction */,
  "device_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the device where the interaction occurred */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the session of interactions */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the interaction (e.g., for long press) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the device during the interaction */,
  "interaction_version" TEXT /* Version of the interaction logging system */,
  "user_feedback" TEXT /* User feedback about the interaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_keypad_interactions_button_id FOREIGN KEY ("button_id") REFERENCES pushbutton_details ("button_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pushbutton_details" (
  "button_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the button */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the button (e.g., green, red) */,
  "diameter" REAL /* Diameter of the button in mm */,
  "led_backlight" INTEGER /* Indicates if the button has an LED backlight */,
  "button_type" TEXT /* Type of the button (e.g., standard, illuminated) */,
  "device_model" TEXT /* Model of the device where the button is used */,
  "manufacturing_date" TEXT /* Date when the button was manufactured */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection for maintenance */,
  "wear_level" TEXT /* Current wear level of the button */,
  "replacement_needed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the button needs replacement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("button_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "capacitive_inputs" (
  "input_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the capacitive input */,
  "controller_type" TEXT /* Type of capacitive touch controller used */,
  "num_pins" INTEGER /* Number of pins available for connecting inputs */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the touch input functionality */,
  "device_model" TEXT /* Model of the device where the capacitive input is used */,
  "manufacturing_date" TEXT /* Date when the capacitive input was manufactured */,
  "last_calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the last calibration for accuracy */,
  "calibration_needed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the capacitive input needs calibration */,
  "sensitivity_level" TEXT /* Current sensitivity level of the input */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("input_id")
)
